title: Chain Patterns for a Song
description: Learn to create multiple patterns and chain them together for a complete song arrangement.

steps.title: Create Your First Pattern
steps.instruction: Start by creating a drum and synth pattern in Pattern 1. This will be your verse or intro.

steps.title: Duplicate to Pattern 2
steps.instruction: Hold Duplicate, tap Pattern 1's pad, then tap Pattern 2's pad to copy your pattern.
steps.tip: This gives you a starting point for a variation.

steps.title: Modify Pattern 2
steps.instruction: Select Pattern 2 and make changes - add fills, change sounds, or adjust the synth melody.

substeps.instruction: Press the Pattern 2 pad to select it
Add or remove steps as desired
Try adding a different synth patch

steps.title: Create More Patterns
steps.instruction: Repeat the duplicate-and-modify process to create patterns 3-8. Consider: verse, chorus, bridge, outro.
steps.tip: Each pattern can have completely different sounds and arrangements.

steps.title: Enter Pattern View
steps.instruction: Press Pattern to see all 8 patterns. They're represented on the first row of pads.

steps.title: Chain the Patterns
steps.instruction: Hold Pattern and tap the patterns in the order you want them to play. For example: 1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 4, 1, 2.
steps.tip: You can use the same pattern multiple times in a chain.

steps.title: Play Your Song
steps.instruction: Press Play. The patterns will now play in the order you specified, creating a complete song arrangement.

outcomes: Multiple patterns forming a song structure
Ability to chain patterns for live performance or arrangement
